name: Oxe Frosted Brownies
recipeInstructions:
BROWNIES:
1. Beat the eggs in a large bowl.
2. Add 3 cups sugar, salt, nuts, and flour to the eggs. Mix well.
3. In a small saucepan, melt 3/4 lb butter and mix with 1 cup cocoa until smooth.
4. Add the butter/cocoa mixture to the egg/sugar mixture. Stir in 2 tsp vanilla.
5. Butter a very large baking pan (larger than 9x13 inches) lightly.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
7. Bake at 325°F for 25 minutes or until set. Brownies are done when the edges pull away from the pan; a toothpick test is not reliable as baking continues after removal.
8. Cool completely before frosting.
FROSTING:
1. Melt 1/4 cup butter in a small saucepan and stir constantly.
2. Add 1/4 cup cocoa, heating until smooth.
3. Pour into a mixing bowl and beat to spreading consistency.
4. Stir in 1/2 tsp vanilla.
5. Frost the cooled brownies.
